title: Stranger's House
original_title: သူစိမ်းအိမ်
overview: Nway Oo and Kay Thi are scheduled to meet an online friend called Mya outside. After enjoying the late-night, Mya called Nway Oo and Kay Thi to sleep along with her. They decided to go back because of strange events, but had to stay there at the request of their friend’s family. But they have to face some terrifying events.
